servinfo.title: Inspection of TCM and Its Circuits
servinfo.ptxt: TCM and its circuits can be checked at TCM wiring connectors by measuring voltage and pulse signal.

attention2.ptxt: TCM cannot be checked by itself, it is strictly prohibited to connect voltmeter or ohmmeter to TCM with connector disconnected from it.

s1.ptxt: Check voltage and/or pulse signal at each terminal of connectors using voltmeter (3) and oscilloscope (4).

item.ptxt: As each terminal voltage is affected by battery voltage, confirm that it is 12 V or more when ignition is ON.
Voltage with asterisk (*) cannot be measured using voltmeter because it is pulse signal. Check it using oscilloscope.

ptxt.intxref: Line pressure control solenoid valve signal
Primary pressure control solenoid valve signal
Low brake control solenoid valve signal

entry.ptxt: Clock signal (ROM included in CVT assembly) *1
Data input/output signal (ROM included in CVT assembly) *1
Chip signal (ROM included in CVT assembly) *1

topic.title: Oscilloscope display
topic.ptxt: Shown below is typical waveform display provided using oscilloscope.

item.ptxt: Display includes the following types of data:
Waveforms may vary with measurement conditions and vehicle specifications.
CVT: Lock-up on after warming up
CVT: Lock-up off after warming up
